locations.name: George Such
locations.summary: George Such (1798–1879) was an English physician and ornithologist, and a member of the Linnean Society of London.

relations.subject: Large-tailed antshrike
relations.evidence: The large-tailed antshrike (Mackenziaena leachii) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Argentina, Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

relations.subject: Large-tailed antshrike
relations.evidence: In the more northerly part of its range it occurs in humid foothill and montane forest, especially in areas with large stands of bamboo
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
